    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    ThinkOption.ThinkBoolean
    Boolean-style think option for models that support simple enable/disable.
    static final record 
    ThinkOption.ThinkLevel
    String-level think option for the GPT-OSS model which requires explicit levels.
